name: Jean Hardin's Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 ½ oz) Cream of Chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in half the butter until onions are soft.
2. Add salt, pepper, soup, and sour cream. Stir until mixed.
3. Pour mixture over hash browns placed in a greased 9x13 casserole dish.
4. Melt remaining butter and mix with corn flake crumbs.
5. Top the casserole with the butter and corn flake crumb mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
